entry.content:
lissy93 opened lissy93/dashy#2150 · May 18, 2026 14:39
Fix safafi large item layout #2150

Category

Bugfix

Overview

Fixes item layout order, for large items, in Safari.

Issue Number

Fixes #1358

entry.title: lissy93 commented on an issue in dashy
entry.content:
lissy93 commented on lissy93/dashy#1358 · May 18, 2026 14:31
lissy93 commented May 18, 2026
Okk, I _think_ the fix is probably just adding `-webkit-box-direction: normal;` to `.tile-title`. ...but, I am too poor to own an Apple device (😩),…
